title: Continuous Probability Distributions
description: Understand PDF, properties, and CDF for continuous variables.

lessons.title: PDF Definition
lessons.content:
## PDF Definition

Probability Density Function describes continuous distributions.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Properties of PDF
lessons.content:
## Properties of PDF

PDF is non-negative; total area under curve equals 1.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Why P(X=a)=0
lessons.content:
## Why P(X=a)=0

For continuous RVs, the probability at any single point is zero.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Calculating from PDF
lessons.content:
## Calculating from PDF

Probabilities are areas under the PDF curve.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: CDF for Continuous
lessons.content:
## CDF for Continuous

F(x) = integral of PDF from -∞ to x.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.
